system.powerDescription:
You may place an invisible mark on any humans or objects you touch, up to a total equal to your CAT. Placing a new mark removes the oldest one if you are at maximum. This does not take a Psyche Burst. 

You can then draw a marked object or entity to you by spending a psyche burst; it will appear in your path naturally, as if by coincidence, before the end of the scene. Affected people will always have a reason they believe for coming this way, even if it would be otherwise unreasonable.
